title: Kitchen Tongs(9'')-304 Easy to Clean-Food Safe Stainless Steel Cooking Tongs,Salad,BBQ,Serving,Frying Tongs Utensils,Kitchen Gift etc,Easy Grip Best Sturdy Tongs,Non Stick.
features: 【Easy to clean】Mirror polished.Easy to wash and safe to clean in your dishwasher.It looks like new after washing.

【Food grade stainless steel】The kitchen cooking tongs are made from 304 stainless steel for unbeatable strength and premium construction while remaining lightweight and easy to handle.These metal tongs are highly heat resistant.

【Openwork Design】Unique design of the 3 lines gap,can help you to filter out the water from the salad and can filter out the oil from the roast meat and other fried foods.It adopt ergonomic design,mirror polished but not slippery at all,easy control and pick things, allow one hand use.

【Multiple uses】Great for taking vegetable, food, sweet , pasta,meat, cheese, bread, ice and more, lightweight and convenient, easy to carry at any place, great for various outdoor activities kitchen things and tools.
description: Product Description Extodry Brand Mission: Extodry brand name comes from the abbreviation of Extraordinary Vocabulary. The purpose of the brand and the company's philosophy is to provide you with high-quality and extraordinary products, so that you can have a better buying and using experience. Feature: Made of 304 stainless steel, corrosion-resistant, rust-proof and safe. Low thermal conductivity, not easy to burn hands, can be used for cooking or grilling. No extra accessories, not easy to damage and very durable. Easy to Clean and Store The surface is polished and smooth, easy to clean, No extra gaps, not easy to hide stains, healthy to use. It can be washed directly in the dishwasher without damage. Tips: Please wash the tongs with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process; Please clean and air dry the tongs after using for your healthy daily use, and store them in dry place for its durability.
